group.value: Group E — opponents Curaçao, Ivory Coast, Ecuador

qualification.value: Qualified as a UEFA group winner (direct) in 2025 European Qualifiers

recent_form.value: Four-time world champions but underwhelming in recent tournaments. Top-10 ranked entering 2026 under Nagelsmann, who is trying to reverse recent World Cup history (group exits 2018 & 2022).

wc_role.value: Contender / dark horse — talented but inconsistent; ranked just outside the top tier

key_players.value: Joshua Kimmich (captain), Jamal Musiala, Florian Wirtz, Kai Havertz, Manuel Neuer

squad_news.value: Nagelsmann named his 26 on 21 May 2026. Manuel Neuer (40) reversed his retirement to return for a 5th and final World Cup, expected to start vs Curaçao on 14 Jun. Jamal Musiala has recovered from the broken leg suffered at the 2025 Club World Cup.
